title: Planet Labs PBC (PL) Reports Revenue Growth and Operational Milestones in Q3 Fiscal 2024
text: Planet Labs PBC reported an 11% year-over-year revenue increase, with Q3 revenue reaching $55.4 million for the quarter ending October 31, 2023. The company maintained a robust financial position with $315 million in cash and no debt on its balance sheet. Gross margin stood at 47% for the quarter, declining from 50% in the prior year's Q3. However, the non-GAAP gross margin measured 52%, compared to 54% previously. The company posted a net loss of $38 million for the three-month period, or $0.13 per share. Customer growth remained steady, with end-of-period customer count climbing 13% year-over-year to 976 accounts. The company achieved 94% recurring annual contract value. Key product achievements included launching 37 new satellites and introducing the Global Forest Carbon product. Strategic partnerships expanded with new contracts including agreements with BASF Digital Farming and the USDA Foreign Agricultural Service. Management projects Q4 2024 revenue between $56 million and $59 million. For the full fiscal year 2024, the company forecasts approximately $218-$221 million in revenue, representing roughly 15% annual growth.
